scope: PDT-2474 (Done): Ensure no CustomerLiability or CustomerReceivable is persisted with zero initial amount across all generation flows (invoice, billing run, orders, deposit, payment, LPF, rescheduling, MLO, reversal, cancellation, disconnection, compensation, etc.).
entry_points: REST /payment (late payment fine listings) + LatePaymentFineController / LatePaymentFineJob → LatePaymentFineService
PaymentService (payment confirm, reversal, invoice cancellation payments, receivable creation)
phoenix-payment-api: PaymentOffsettingTransactionalService (and VirtualPos/CashTerminal variants) → overpayment CustomerReceivable, LFP liability path when amount > 0

upstream.name: CustomerLiabilityRequest
upstream.usage: Manual create/update; @DecimalMin(0, inclusive=false) on initialAmount for POST/PUT groups

upstream.name: Invoice lifecycle
upstream.usage: Invoice REAL + document type gates liability/receivable from invoice (CustomerLiabilityService.createLiabilityFromInvoice, CustomerReceivableService.createFromInvoice)

upstream.name: BillingRunStartAccountingInvokeService
upstream.usage: Parallel jobs: generateLiabilities (non–credit-note invoices), generateReceivables (credit notes, excluding correction type for receivable filter), then compensationReceivableService

upstream.name: Contract order processing
upstream.usage: GoodsOrderProcessService / ServiceOrderProcessService call createLiabilityFromInvoice with GOODS_ORDER / SERVICE_ORDER

upstream.name: DepositService
upstream.usage: Delegates to CustomerLiabilityService.createLiabilityFromDeposit and CustomerReceivableService.createFromDeposit with user-provided amounts

upstream.name: LatePaymentFineService / LatePaymentFineJob
upstream.usage: LPF records drive liability (and receivable on reversal paths); job filters id/amount > 0

upstream.name: PaymentService
upstream.usage: Creates/updates receivables on payment flows and reversals

upstream.name: phoenix-core-lib
upstream.usage: Domain services, mappers, entities; consumed by phoenix-core controllers and phoenix-payment-api

downstream.name: LiabilityDirectOffsettingService
downstream.usage: DLO after invoice cancellation receivable, deposit receivable vs deposit liabilities, VAT-base pairing

downstream.name: UI listings and reports
downstream.usage: Repositories + CustomerDetailsRepository SQL joining customer_liabilities to invoices

downstream.name: External payment channels
downstream.usage: phoenix-payment-api uses CustomerLiabilityRepository / CustomerReceivableRepository for offsetting

shared: CreationType, receivable schema tables and offsetting link tables
integration_points: Billing run: set invoice REAL → generateLiabilities + generateReceivables + compensationReceivableService.runInvoiceCompensation
Invoice cancellation: InvoiceCancellationService ↔ CustomerLiabilityService / CustomerReceivableService (INVOICE_CANCELLATION, createReceivableForInvoiceCancellation, direct offsetting)
Invoice reversal: InvoiceReversalProcessService ↔ createLiabilityForReversal / createReceivableForReversal (VAT base receivables + signum branches for main receivable vs liability)
Deposit: liability + receivable creation and CustomerLiabilityPaidByDeposit / DLO
Payment: PaymentService + payment-api offsetting services (overpayment receivable when totalReceivableAmount > 0)
LPF: LatePaymentFineService job and online payment createLiabilityFromLatePaymentFineOnlinePayment
MLO: ManualLiabilityOffsettingService create/reverse (reversal receivable from liability)
Order invoices: OrderInvoiceService maintains/deletes liabilities tied to order invoices (not primary creator)

what_could_break.item: Any flow that builds CustomerLiability/CustomerReceivable with initialAmount 0
what_could_break.reason: ZeroAmountValidationListener @PrePersist throws IllegalArgumentException; transaction fails unless code skips building entity or catches and handles
mapLiabilityFromInvoice sets initial/current to calculated amount; listener rejects zero; parallel billing-run tasks may record exceptions in exceptionContext

what_could_break.item: Credit note receivable from invoice with zero total
Deposit or test endpoints with amount 0
what_could_break.reason: Persist attempt fails at listener if service still saves

what_could_break.item: Assumptions in tests/ETL that zero-amount rows exist
what_could_break.reason: Counts and list filters change; OrderInvoiceService even queries find*ByLiabilityAmountZero suggesting legacy zero-liability cases
Already guarded with totalReceivableAmount.compareTo(ZERO) > 0; tightening elsewhere must stay consistent

what_could_break.item: Reversal main receivable when net amount is zero
what_could_break.reason: Logic intentionally avoids main receivable; VAT-base receivables still saved—each must be non-zero or skipped by mapper

technical_details: Jira PDT-2474: Customer Feedback, Done. Core implementation in phoenix-core-lib: ZeroAmountValidationListener (PrePersist on CustomerLiability and CustomerReceivable) throws if initialAmount is zero. Partial explicit skips: CustomerLiabilityMapperService.generateAdditionalLiabilitiesForVatBase (lines ~422–424) and CustomerReceivableService.createAdditionalReceivableForVatBase (~1342–1344) skip VAT-base groups when totalAmountWithoutVatMainCurrencySummary == 0; CustomerReceivableMapperService mirrors for receivable VAT base. CustomerLiabilityService.createReceivableForReversal handles receivableCalculatedAmount signum -1/0/+1 (zero: no main receivable, only VAT-base receivables). CustomerLiabilityService: create, createLiabilityFromInvoice, createLiability(Invoice, BigDecimal, source, withAutomaticOffsetting), createLiabilityForReversal, createReceivableForReversal, createLiabilityFromAction, createLiabilityFromLatePaymentFine, createLiabilityFromClaimedPenalty, createLiabilityFromLatePaymentFineOnlinePayment, createLiabilityFromDeposit, createLiabilityFromRescheduling, createLiabilityFromInvoicedCompensation, createLiabilityFromReverseCompensation, createLiabilityDependingOnVatBase. CustomerReceivableService: create, createFromInvoice, createReceivableForInvoiceCancellation, createFromDeposit, createReceivableFromInvoicedCompensation, createReceivableDependingOnCustomerVatBase, createAdditionalReceivableForVatBase. BillingRunStartAccountingInvokeService: generateLiabilities, generateReceivables. InvoiceCancellationService uses INVOICE_CANCELLATION. Controllers in phoenix-core: CustomerLiabilityController (/customer-liability), CustomReceivableController (/customer-receivable), ReschedulingController, ManualLiabilityOffsettingController, LatePaymentFineController. Payment module: phoenix-payment-api PaymentOffsettingTransactionalService (LFP liability when latePaymentAmount > 0; receivable when totalReceivableAmount > 0). Enum LiabilityOrReceivableCreationSource: BILLING_RUN, GOODS_ORDER, SERVICE_ORDER, INVOICE_CANCELLATION.
